settings.colorPaletteDesc: Pick a palette or override individual sub-goal colours below.
settings.customSubGoalColorsDesc: Override any individual block. Leave a colour unset to inherit from the palette.
settings.inheritActionColors: Actions inherit their parent sub-goal colour
settings.centerLayoutDesc: Decide how the main goal appears inside the 3×3 centre.
settings.directionalBridgesDesc: Centre goal plus three inner bridge boxes referencing sub-goals with arrows.
settings.centerBackgroundDesc: Choose whether the middle 3×3 zone blends with the white card or matches the page's grey backdrop.
settings.matchPageDesc: Light grey like the outer page.
settings.agentEtiquetteDesc: Customise the etiquette guidelines shown to AI agents on the landing page.
